parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.n8n_failures (workflow_id, workflow_name, execution_id, execution_url, failed_node_name, failed_node_type, error_message, payload_snippet) VALUES ($1, $2, NULLIF($3, ''), NULLIF($4, ''), $5, $6, $7, $8::jsonb) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Supabase - Log Failure
nodes.notes: Writes to public.n8n_failures in bfc-subcontractor-demo. Table created 2026-05-04. Replaces the v1 NocoDB placeholder node. RETURNING id is captured but unused; useful for future cross-references.

parameters.text:
=🚨 *Workflow `{{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.workflow_name }}` FAILED*

*Failed Node:* `{{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.failed_node_name }}`
*Node Type:* `{{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.failed_node_type }}`
*Execution ID:* `{{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.execution_id }}`
*Workflow ID:* `{{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.workflow_id }}`
*Time:* {{ $('Format Error Detail').first().json.timestamp }}
*Logged:* `n8n_failures.id = {{ $json.id }}`

*Error:*

nodes.name: Slack #bfc-compliance-alerts
nodes.notes: Reads parsed values from Format Error Detail (upstream) and the inserted row ID from Supabase - Log Failure (immediate previous). Slack credential type matches the existing live workflow (slackOAuth2Api), not the newer slackApi credential.
